turns.transcript: So the thing I'm trying to figure out is whether the migration needs to happen before the next release, or if we can just ship the smaller fix first and roll the rest out later.
turns.speaker: primary

turns.transcript: The other piece I keep going back and forth on is whether the on-call rotation can actually absorb another service this quarter without burning people out.
turns.speaker: primary

turns.transcript: Thinking out loud, we have the staging environment but it's pointed at the old database, so we would need to repoint it first, then run the backfill, then verify.
turns.speaker: primary

turns.transcript: Okay, I think the plan is clear enough, so let's write it up, get two reviewers on it, and target the end of the sprint for the first half of the rollout.
turns.speaker: primary

notes: Long single-utterance turns, no intra-turn pauses, 2.5s gaps (1:1 with Flux).
